title: serpentine: When Mamba Needs Attention — code, results, and pre-registered decision rules
description: Code, training curves, evaluation artifacts, and pre-registered decision rules for the paper “When Mamba Needs Attention”: a matched-budget study of state-space (Mamba) encoders versus attention for TSP-100 routing under POMO reinforcement learning. Includes the Hilbert/random/sort ordering ablation across seeds, receptive-field and geometry diagnostics, bidirectional-Mamba and global-channel arms, the hybrid encoder (4 BiMamba layers + 1 attention layer) that beats the attention baseline on multistart tour quality at a converged budget, and the best-of-k serialization-ensembling probe.
